passiveAbilities.name: Poking Stick
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing Melee Dmg, reduce the Dmg dealt to W.

arcaneAbilities.name: Librarian's Scorn
arcaneAbilities.description:
Move target X” directly away, then it suffers X-1 Wds. 
Catastrophe:  This model suffers 3 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Caustic Contract
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target model suffers X-1 Wds, then it gains [Protection: The first time this character would suffer Dmg, reduce that Dmg to W], until end of turn. 
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Energy Syphon
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target a friendly model. Flip an Arcane card and redistribute up to X energy from that model to any combination of models within 8”, where X is the value on the card.
Catastrophe: The target loses 2 energy and this character suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Shhhhh!
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of Melee then it must discard 1 energy, if able.
